## Related issue (required)

Closes #<!-- number -->

     CI checks for a `Closes/Fixes/Resolves #number` reference. -->

## What & why

<!-- What changed and why, in a paragraph or two. -->

## How verified

- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests` passes
- [ ] (UI change) opened the report and checked — what I saw:
- [ ] (behavior change) added/updated the relevant tests

## Scope check

- [ ] Still zero-dependency (standard library only; the report is self-contained)
- [ ] No raw text (prompts, tool output, file contents) included
- [ ] New metrics state a measured / inferred / approximate label
- [ ] Commits split into logical units
